caption: In an indoor hallway with light-colored walls and polished flooring, three men wearing grey polo shirts and dark trousers walk forward. The space is decorated with several spherical, copper-colored hanging lights. A white Real Madrid crest logo is visible in the upper right corner of the scene. In the first frame, a timestamp reading "14:05" appears in the lower-left corner. As the sequence progresses, the men move from left to right across the frame. The man leading the group carries a dark smartphone in his hand. In the background of the second and third frames, other figures can be seen further down the hall. The men maintain a casual pace and distance from one another as they traverse the corridor, with the camera tracking their movement.
